# programs.anki

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.anki`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.anki.addons` | `list of package` | List of Anki add-on packages to install. |
| `programs.anki.answerKeys` | `list of (submodule)` | Overrides for choosing what keyboard shortcut activates each answer button. The Anki default will be used for ones without an override defined. |
| `programs.anki.answerKeys.*.ease` | `signed integer` | Number associated with an answer button. By default, 1 = Again, 2 = Hard, 3 = Good, and 4 = Easy. |
| `programs.anki.answerKeys.*.key` | `string` | Keyboard shortcut for this answer button. The shortcut should be in the string format used by <https://doc.qt.io/qt-6/qkeysequence.html>. |
| `programs.anki.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Anki. |
| `programs.anki.hideBottomBar` | `null or boolean` | Hide bottom bar during review. |
| `programs.anki.hideBottomBarMode` | `null or one of "fullscreen", "always"` | When to hide the bottom bar when `hideBottomBar` is enabled. |
| `programs.anki.hideTopBar` | `null or boolean` | Hide top bar during review. |
| `programs.anki.hideTopBarMode` | `null or one of "fullscreen", "always"` | When to hide the top bar when `hideTopBar` is enabled. |
| `programs.anki.language` | `non-empty string` | Display language. Should be an underscore separated language tag. See <https://github.com/ankitects/anki/blob/main/pylib/anki/lang.py> for supported tags. |
| `programs.anki.legacyImportExport` | `null or boolean` | Use legacy (pre 2.1.55) import/export handling code. |
| `programs.anki.minimalistMode` | `null or boolean` | Minimalist user interface mode. |
| `programs.anki.package` | `package` | The anki package to use. |
| `programs.anki.profiles` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Anki profiles and their settings. Profiles are primarily intended to be one per person, and are not recommended for splitting up your own content. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.default` | `boolean` | Open this profile on startup. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.autoSync` | `null or boolean` | Automatically sync on profile open/close. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.autoSyncMediaMinutes` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Automatically sync media every X minutes. Set this to 0 to disable periodic media syncing. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.keyFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing the sync account sync key. This is different from the account password. To get the sync key, follow these steps: - Enable this Home Manager module: `programs.anki.enable = true` - Open Anki. - Navigate to the sync settings page. (Tools > Preferences > Syncing) - Log in to your AnkiWeb account. - Select "Yes" to the prompt about saving preferences and syncing. - A Home Manager warning prompt will show. Select "Show details...". - Get your sync key from the message: "syncKey changed from \`None\` to \`<YOUR SYNC KEY WILL BE HERE>\`" |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.networkTimeout` | `null or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0)` | Network timeout in seconds (clamped between 30 and 99999). |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.syncMedia` | `null or boolean` | Synchronize audio and images too. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.url` | `null or string` | Custom sync server URL. See <https://docs.ankiweb.net/sync-server.html>. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.username` | `null or string` | Sync account username. |
| `programs.anki.profiles.<name>.sync.usernameFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing the sync account username. |
| `programs.anki.reduceMotion` | `null or boolean` | Disable various animations and transitions of the user interface. |
| `programs.anki.spacebarRatesCard` | `null or boolean` | Spacebar (or enter) also answers card. |
| `programs.anki.style` | `null or one of "anki", "native"` | Widgets style. |
| `programs.anki.theme` | `null or one of "followSystem", "light", "dark"` | Theme to use. |
| `programs.anki.uiScale` | `null or integer or floating point number between 1.0 and 2.0 (both inclusive)` | User interface scale. |
| `programs.anki.videoDriver` | `null or one of "opengl", "angle", "software", "metal", "vulkan", "d3d11"` | Video driver to use. |
